name: Secrets Dispatcher Demo Locator
description: Test-only helper for the Tier-2 demo harness: exposes a D-Bus method that locates a gnome-shell UI element by its visible label and returns its on-screen rectangle. gnome-shell's own accessibility (Cally) does not report element geometry, and there is no supported external API for it (GNOME devs recommend exactly this: an extension exporting a D-Bus interface). demo.sh uses it to aim host-side QMP clicks at notification buttons by text instead of hardcoded pixels.
